codeReview.summary: The package structure and core CRUD flows are implemented, but there are contract-level mismatches against the stated requirement to match Elixir CRUD behavior/shape.

issues.description: Create does not model Elixir duplicate-ID behavior. Elixir returns `{:error, :duplicate_id}` when a provided id already exists (lib/bropilot/crud/crud.ex:22,40-42), but TS create only returns success or validation errors. MemoryStore also overwrites existing ids (`packages/crud/src/store/memory.ts:21`), and D1Store insert on duplicate id will throw instead of returning a contract error (`packages/crud/src/store/d1.ts:29-31`). This breaks "same API contract as Elixir CRUD".

Pagination shape uses `pageSize` (camelCase), while Elixir CRUD uses `page_size` (snake_case) in both options and returned metadata (`lib/bropilot/crud/crud.ex:119-127,132,158`). The feature/validation contract requires structural equivalence of field names for API contract matching, so this is a contract mismatch.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Cross-language API parity rules are not explicit enough in shared conventions for TypeScript package work, which likely allowed pagination naming drift (`pageSize` vs Elixir `page_size`).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md TypeScript section is high-level only; feature requirement says match Elixir contract. Implementation uses `pageSize` in packages/crud/src/types.ts:42 and packages/crud/src/crud.ts:173.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure says "Write tests first (RED)", but transcript skeleton shows implementation files were created before tests while handoff still marked `followedProcedure: true`. This suggests procedure wording or adherence signaling is inconsistent.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl skeleton (session 417719b9-d823-4966-9a70-0e6b89e84e91) shows Create of src/types.ts, src/store/*, src/crud.ts before first test file creation (src/__tests__/crud.test.ts). Skill: .factory/skills/typescript-packages/SKILL.md step 3.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit b5621fe diff, transcript skeleton, and skill/shared-state docs. Marking feature as fail due to two blocking API-contract mismatches: duplicate-id handling in create and pagination naming parity with Elixir.
